Next Steps



  1. Choose 3 pilot states for initial UCC scraper development (recommend: CA, TX, FL for high MCA volume)
  2. Set up Postgres database to replace GitHub Spark KV
  3. Implement Free Tier sources first (SEC, OSHA, USPTO)
  4. Build MCP server for data abstraction
  5. Add tier management and usage tracking
  6. Integrate Stripe for payment processing

I can help you implement any of these phases. Which would you like to start with?
